## Overview

This document provides the supplementary material accompanying our study *Climate-driven variability in phenological mismatch undermines reproductive success in a tropical apex predator*. It contains additional methodological details, model workflows, diagnostic checks, sensitivity analyses, and all supporting figures.

To ensure transparency and reproducibility, we also provide the complete datasets (in `.csv` format) and the full statistical models (as R Data Serializable `.rds` files). All files are available in the public repository:


### Contents

S1. Chlorophyll-a bloom detection

S2. Phenological mismatches

S3. Model fitting workflow

S4. Model diagnostics and selection

S5. Model comparison

S6. Supplementary figures

S7. Sensitivity analyses: Bloom onset thresholds

S8. Sensitivity analyses: Bloom threshold definition

S9. Code for figures
